name: ML-DSA.Verify_internal
label: Algorithm 8
body_raw: (𝑐, 𝐳, 𝐡) ← sigDecode(𝜎) 𝑐,̃ response 𝐳, and hint 𝐡̃ ▷ signer’s commitment hash
if 𝐡 = ⊥ then return false ▷ hint was not properly encoded
𝐀 ← ExpandA(𝜌) ▷ 𝐀 is generated and stored in NTT representation as 𝐀
𝜇 ← (H(BytesToBits(𝑡𝑟)||𝑀 ′, 64)) ▷ message representative that may optionally be computed in a different cryptographic module
𝑐 ∈ 𝑅 𝑞 ← SampleInBall(𝑐)̃ ▷ compute verifier’s challenge from 𝑐̃
𝐰′ ← NTT−1(𝐀 ∘̂ NTT(𝐳) − NTT(𝑐) ∘ NTT(𝐭1 ⋅ 2𝑑)) ▷ 𝐰′ = 𝐀𝐳 − 𝑐𝐭1 ⋅ 2𝑑 Approx Approx
𝐰1 ′ ← UseHint(𝐡, 𝐰′ ) ▷ reconstruction of signer’s commitment Approx
▷ UseHint is applied componentwise (see explanatory text in Section 7.4)
𝑐′̃ ← H(𝜇||w1Encode(𝐰′ 1), 𝜆/4) ▷ hash it; this should match 𝑐̃
